goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 08:00' and should depart from 'broxbourne'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 08:00 and should depart from broxbourne
The train should leave on friday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the cheap price range and should include free parking
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the type of guesthouse
